requirements.summary: Build Homepage with hero banner, featured products section, and promotional banner
acceptanceCriteria: Hero banner is displayed at the top with a headline and CTA.
Featured products are fetched from the backend and displayed in a grid.
Promotional section is visible below the hero.

file_operations.description: Create Homepage component with hero banner section using frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-banner.dim_1400x500.png, featured products grid fetching from backend getFeaturedProducts method, and promotional banner section using frontend/public/assets/generated/promo-banner.dim_1400x120.png. Include headline, CTA button linking to /shop, and responsive product grid.

Create reusable HeroBanner component displaying the hero image from frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-banner.dim_1400x500.png with overlay, headline text, and CTA button. Apply luxurious styling with blush/ivory tones and elegant typography.

Create FeaturedProducts component that calls backend getFeaturedProducts method and displays products in a responsive grid. Each product card shows image, name, category, price, and Add to Cart button with smooth hover transitions.

Create PromoBanner component displaying promotional content with frontend/public/assets/generated/promo-banner.dim_1400x120.png as background. Include marquee-style text highlighting current offers with champagne/gold accent styling.
Update App component to add route for HomePage at / path. Wrap route with Layout component to ensure consistent navigation and styling.

requirements.summary: Build Product Catalog page with filtering and product grid
acceptanceCriteria: All products are listed in a responsive grid layout.
Category and price range filters are functional.
Each card has image, name, category, price, and Add to Cart button.
Adding to cart calls the backend addToCart method.

file_operations.description: Create ShopPage component that fetches all products via backend getProducts method. Display products in responsive grid with filtering controls for category and price range. Each product card includes image (using frontend/public/assets/generated/product-placeholder.dim_600x600.png as fallback), name, category, price, and Add to Cart button that calls backend addToCart with session ID from session utility.

Create reusable ProductCard component displaying product image, name, category, price with elegant styling and smooth hover effects. Include Add to Cart button that accepts product and quantity, calls backend addToCart with session ID, and shows feedback. Use champagne gold accents and blush rose borders on hover. Use frontend/public/assets/generated/product-placeholder.dim_600x600.png as fallback image.

Create ProductFilters component with dropdown/checkbox controls for category selection and price range slider. Apply filter state to product list in ShopPage. Style with ivory/blush palette and smooth transitions.

Create session utility that generates or retrieves a session ID from localStorage. Export getSessionId function that creates a UUID on first call and stores it in localStorage for subsequent retrievals. This session ID will be used for all backend cart operations.
Update App component to add route for ShopPage at /shop path. Wrap route with Layout component.

requirements.summary: Build Product Detail page with full product information and quantity selector
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to a product detail page shows all product fields.
Quantity selector allows selecting how many to add.
Add to Cart button is disabled when stock is 0.
Page is accessible via a route such as /product/:id.

file_operations.description: Create ProductDetailPage component accessible at /product/:id route. Fetch product data via backend getProductById method. Display large product image (with frontend/public/assets/generated/product-placeholder.dim_600x600.png fallback), name, category, full description, price, and stock status. Include quantity selector and Add to Cart button that calls backend addToCart with session ID. Disable button when stock is 0. Apply luxurious layout with generous whitespace and elegant typography.

Create reusable QuantitySelector component with increment/decrement buttons and numeric input. Enforce min value of 1 and max based on available stock. Style with champagne gold buttons and smooth hover transitions.
Update App component to add route for ProductDetailPage at /product/:id path. Wrap route with Layout component.

requirements.summary: Build Shopping Cart page displaying cart items with controls and subtotal
acceptanceCriteria: All cart items are listed with image, name, price, and quantity.
Quantity can be increased/decreased per item.
Items can be removed from the cart.
Subtotal is calculated and displayed.
Proceed to Checkout button is present.

file_operations.description: Create CartPage component that fetches cart via backend getCart method using session ID from session utility. Display cart items with product image, name, unit price, quantity controls, and line total. Include Remove button per item calling backend removeFromCart. Show calculated subtotal. Include Proceed to Checkout button linking to /checkout. Handle empty cart state with message and link back to /shop. Apply clean layout with blush/ivory styling.

Create CartItem component displaying individual cart line item with product image, name, unit price, quantity controls (using QuantitySelector), line total, and Remove button. Quantity changes call backend updateCartItem with session ID. Remove button calls backend removeFromCart with session ID. Style with elegant spacing and hover effects.
Update App component to add route for CartPage at /cart path. Wrap route with Layout component.

requirements.summary: Build Checkout page with order summary and confirmation flow
acceptanceCriteria: Order summary lists items and total before placement.
Clicking Place Order calls the backend and returns an order ID.
Cart is cleared after successful order.
A confirmation message with the order ID is shown.

file_operations.description: Create CheckoutPage component displaying order summary with items and total from backend getCart using session ID. Include Place Order button that calls backend placeOrder method with session ID, then calls backend clearCart with session ID. On success, navigate to /order-confirmation with order ID in state. Show loading state during order placement. Apply elegant styling with ivory/blush palette.

Create OrderConfirmationPage component displaying success message with order ID received from CheckoutPage navigation state. Include link to continue shopping (/shop). Style with celebratory yet elegant design using champagne gold accents and generous whitespace.
Update App component to add routes for CheckoutPage at /checkout path and OrderConfirmationPage at /order-confirmation path. Wrap routes with Layout component.

requirements.summary: Apply luxurious visual theme with sticky navigation throughout the site
acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses ivory/blush/gold tones consistently across all pages.
Headings use an elegant serif or refined font style.
Navigation bar is sticky and shows cart item count.
Cards and buttons have smooth hover effects.
Layout uses consistent spacing and whitespace.

file_operations.description: Add custom CSS variables for luxurious color palette: ivory (#FAF7F5), blush rose (#F5D5CB), champagne gold (#D4AF37), and warm neutrals. Define elegant serif font family for headings (e.g., Playfair Display, Lora) via @import from Google Fonts. Add smooth transition defaults and global spacing rules for generous whitespace. Ensure existing Tailwind directives remain intact.

Extend Tailwind theme with custom colors matching the luxurious palette (ivory, blush, champagne, warmNeutral shades). Add custom font family for serif headings. Configure spacing scale for generous whitespace. Add smooth transition timing functions.

Create Layout component wrapping all pages with sticky top navigation bar. Navigation includes brand logo (Glow Shop), links to Home (/), Shop (/shop), and Cart (/cart) with cart icon and item count badge fetched from backend getCart using session ID. Apply blush/ivory header styling with champagne gold accents. Include smooth scroll behavior and consistent page margins.

Create Navigation component for sticky top nav bar with brand logo, navigation links (Home, Shop, Cart), and cart icon with item count badge. Fetch cart count via backend getCart method using session ID. Style with ivory background, blush borders, champagne gold hover effects, and elegant typography. Ensure sticky positioning and z-index for proper layering.

requirements.summary: Render generated static image assets in Homepage and product views
acceptanceCriteria: Hero banner image is loaded from frontend/public/assets/generated.
Product placeholder images are served from the same directory.
No broken image links on any page.

file_operations.description: Create imageHelpers utility providing functions to resolve static image paths from frontend/public/assets/generated. Export getHeroImage returning '/assets/generated/hero-banner.dim_1400x500.png', getProductPlaceholder returning '/assets/generated/product-placeholder.dim_600x600.png', and getPromoBanner returning '/assets/generated/promo-banner.dim_1400x120.png'. Include fallback logic for missing images.

Update HeroBanner component to use imageHelpers.getHeroImage() for hero banner image source, ensuring frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-banner.dim_1400x500.png is rendered correctly with proper alt text and responsive sizing.

Update PromoBanner component to use imageHelpers.getPromoBanner() for background image, ensuring frontend/public/assets/generated/promo-banner.dim_1400x120.png is applied as CSS background with proper positioning and sizing.

Update ProductCard component to use imageHelpers.getProductPlaceholder() as fallback when product.imageUrl is empty or invalid, ensuring frontend/public/assets/generated/product-placeholder.dim_600x600.png is used with proper alt text and responsive sizing.

Update ProductDetailPage component to use imageHelpers.getProductPlaceholder() as fallback for product image, ensuring frontend/public/assets/generated/product-placeholder.dim_600x600.png is displayed when product.imageUrl is unavailable.
